title: erigeron anisophyllus
intro: Erigeron anisophyllus, also known as the small leaf fleabane, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron anisophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be infused in hot water to make a tea or used in salves and tinctures.
